message.content:
{
  "cases": [
    {
      "input_lines": [
        "[{\"id\": \"A\", \"expected_return\": 0.05, \"volatility\": 0.1}, {\"id\": \"B\", \"expected_return\": 0.05, \"volatility\": 0.1}, {\"id\": \"C\", \"expected_return\": 0.06, \"volatility\": 0.2}, {\"id\": \"D\", \"expected_return\": 0.04, \"volatility\": 0.05}]",
        "{\"A\": 0.05, \"B\": 0.05, \"C\": 0.06, \"D\": 0.04}",
        "\"absolute\"",
        "null",
        "0.35",
        "0.4",
        "0.01",
        "0.2",
        "0.2",
        "false"
      ],
      "focus": "Exact-score ties between assets A and B with identical returns and volatilities; tests deterministic lexicographic tie-breaking and disabling diversification penalty (absolute mode)."
    },
    {
      "input_lines": [
        "[{\"id\": \"X\", \"expected_return\": 0.02, \"volatility\": 0.1}, {\"id\": \"Y\", \"expected_return\": 0.08, \"volatility\": 0.2}]",
        "{\"X\": 0.01, \"Y\": 0.09}",
        "\"risk_adjusted\"",
        "[1.0, 0.0]",
        "1.0",
        "0.1",
        "0.01",
        "0.2",
        "0.2",
        "true"
      ],
      "focus": "Turnover budget too small to move from an all-in previous allocation; should force returning prev_weights unchanged (tests turnover-budget early-exit behavior)."
    },
    {
      "input_lines": [
        "[{\"id\": \"AssetA\", \"expected_return\": 0.07, \"volatility\": 0.15}, {\"id\": \"asset02\", \"expected_return\": 0.07, \"volatility\": 0.15}, {\"id\": \"mid\", \"expected_return\": 0.06, \"volatility\": 0.12}, {\"id\": \"zeta\", \"expected_return\": 0.05, \"volatility\": 0.05}, {\"id\": \"zeroVol\", \"expected_return\": 0.05, \"volatility\": 0.0}, {\"id\": \"eq1\", \"expected_return\": 0.05, \"volatility\": 0.05}, {\"id\": \"eq2\", \"expected_return\": 0.05, \"volatility\": 0.05}]",
        "{\"AssetA\": 0.08, \"asset02\": 0.06, \"mid\": 0.065, \"zeta\": 0.05, \"zeroVol\": 0.051, \"eq1\": 0.05, \"eq2\": 0.05}",
        "\"risk_adjusted\"",
        "[0.2, 0.05, 0.15, 0.1, 0.1, 0.2, 0.2]",
        "0.25",
        "0.5",
        "0.01",
        "0.5",
        "0.5",
        "true"
      ],
      "focus": "Many-assets case including a zero-volatility asset and multiple equal scores; tests smoothing with non-default alpha/beta, per-asset caps, diversification penalty, and lexicographic ordering with mixed-case IDs."
    }
  ]
}
